features.name: /clear
features.summary_ja: 会話履歴をクリアして新しい状態から始める
features.description_ja: 現在のセッションの会話履歴をクリア。メモリ（永続化された情報）は保持される。長時間のセッションで文脈をリセットしたい時に使う。
features.summary_en: Clear conversation history and start fresh from a clean state
features.description_en: Clears the conversation history of the current session while preserving any saved memory or persistent information. This command is useful when you want to reset the context during long-running sessions without losing important stored data. The cleared history cannot be recovered, so use this when you're ready to start a new conversation thread within the same session.

features.name: /help
features.summary_ja: 利用可能なコマンド一覧を表示
features.description_ja: Claude Code で使える組み込みコマンドの一覧を表示。困ったらまずこれ。
features.summary_en: Display a list of available commands in Claude Code for quick reference and assistance.
features.description_en: Shows a comprehensive list of built-in commands available in Claude Code. This is the first command to use when you need help navigating the system. It displays all the commands you can use to interact with Claude Code, making it easy to discover features and understand how to accomplish tasks. Whether you're new to Claude Code or looking for a specific command, this help command provides a quick reference guide to get you started.

features.name: /memory
features.summary_ja: メモリーシステムを管理
features.description_ja: ユーザーの好み、プロジェクトの背景、フィードバックなどを永続的に蓄積するメモリーシステムを管理。将来の対話で自動的に参照される。
features.summary_en: Manage the memory system for storing and retrieving persistent user information and preferences.
features.description_en: Manage a memory system that persistently stores user preferences, project backgrounds, feedback, and other contextual information. This accumulated data is automatically referenced in future conversations, enabling Claude to maintain continuity and provide personalized responses based on previous interactions. The memory system enhances conversation quality by building on established context over time.

features.name: /agents
features.summary_ja: サブエージェントを管理
features.description_ja: サブエージェントの定義・起動・状態確認。複雑なタスクを並列実行する際に使う。Task tool と組み合わせる。
features.summary_en: Manage sub-agents for handling complex tasks in parallel execution with definitions, launches, and status monitoring capabilities.
features.description_en: Manage sub-agents by defining, launching, and monitoring their status. This feature enables parallel execution of complex tasks by coordinating multiple sub-agents simultaneously. Use it in combination with the Task tool to break down complicated workflows into manageable sub-processes. Sub-agents can operate independently while being orchestrated by the parent agent, allowing efficient handling of multi-step operations that would be difficult to execute sequentially.

features.name: /context
features.summary_ja: コンテキストウィンドウ使用率を表示
features.description_ja: 現在のセッションでのコンテキスト使用率を確認。長時間セッションでの圧縮タイミング判断に役立つ。
features.summary_en: Display the current context window usage rate for the ongoing session.
features.description_en: Check your context usage rate in the current session. This command helps you understand how much of your available context window you've consumed, which is particularly useful for long-running sessions. By monitoring context usage, you can make informed decisions about when to compress or summarize your conversation history to maintain optimal performance and token efficiency.

features.name: /hooks
features.summary_ja: フック設定を管理
features.description_ja: PreToolUse/PostToolUse/Stop等のイベントで自動実行するシェルスクリプトを設定。
features.summary_en: Manage hook configurations for automatic execution of shell scripts on events
features.description_en: Configure shell scripts to automatically execute on various events such as PreToolUse, PostToolUse, and Stop. Hooks allow you to define custom automation that runs at specific points in the tool execution lifecycle. This feature enables integration of custom logic, logging, monitoring, or other automated tasks triggered by tool-related events without modifying the core tool functionality.

features.name: /init
features.summary_ja: CLAUDE.md を初期化
features.description_ja: 現在のリポジトリを分析して CLAUDE.md（プロジェクトガイダンスファイル）の雛形を生成。
features.summary_en: Initialize CLAUDE.md file for the repository with project guidance and best practices documentation.
features.description_en: Analyzes the current repository structure and automatically generates a template for CLAUDE.md, which serves as a project guidance file. This initialization helps establish consistent documentation standards and provides a foundation for project-specific instructions, architecture notes, and development guidelines. The generated template is tailored to the repository's contents and can be customized to include relevant context for collaborators and AI assistants working with the codebase.

features.name: /review
features.summary_ja: プルリクエストをレビュー
features.description_ja: 現在のブランチまたは指定PRをレビュー。コード品質、バグ可能性、改善提案を返す。
features.summary_en: Review pull requests for code quality, potential bugs, and improvement suggestions
features.description_en: Review the current branch or a specified pull request. This feature analyzes code quality, identifies potential bugs, and provides actionable improvement suggestions. It helps maintain code standards and catch issues before merging. Simply use the command to get comprehensive feedback on your changes.

features.name: /config
features.summary_ja: 設定を表示・変更
features.description_ja: テーマ、モデル、その他のユーザー設定を変更。settings.json の代替インタフェース。
features.summary_en: Display and modify configuration settings for theme, model, and other user preferences.
features.description_en: Manage theme, model selection, and other user configuration settings through an intuitive interface. This command serves as an alternative to directly editing settings.json, allowing users to easily view and modify their preferences without manual file manipulation. Changes take effect immediately and are persisted for future sessions.

features.name: /model
features.summary_ja: 使用するモデルを切り替え
features.description_ja: Opus / Sonnet / Haiku など、現在のセッションで使用するモデルを切り替える。
features.summary_en: Switch the AI model used in the current session between different versions like Opus, Sonnet, or Haiku.
features.description_en: Allows you to switch between different Claude models during your current session. You can choose from various model options such as Opus for advanced capabilities, Sonnet for balanced performance, or Haiku for faster responses. This command enables you to change models on-the-fly without ending your session, making it easy to adapt to different tasks and performance requirements.

features.name: /status
features.summary_ja: セッション状態を表示
features.description_ja: 現在のセッションの統計情報（モデル、ディレクトリ、git状態など）を表示。
features.summary_en: Display current session status and statistics
features.description_en: Displays comprehensive statistical information about the current session, including the active model, working directory, and git repository state. This command provides a quick overview of your session configuration and environment details, helping you verify that you're working with the correct settings and project context.

features.name: /cost
features.summary_ja: API利用コストを表示
features.description_ja: 現在のセッションでのAPIトークン使用量とコストを確認。
features.summary_en: Display API usage costs and token consumption for the current session.
features.description_en: Check the API token usage and associated costs for your current session. This command provides detailed information about resource consumption, helping you monitor and track expenses related to API calls made during your interaction. Use this feature to stay informed about your API usage patterns and manage your budget effectively.

features.name: /compact
features.summary_ja: コンテキストを強制圧縮
features.description_ja: コンテキストが膨らんだとき、過去の会話を要約して圧縮。重要な情報は保持。
features.summary_en: Force compress context by summarizing past conversations while retaining important information when context becomes too large.
features.description_en: Automatically compresses the conversation context when it becomes too large by summarizing previous messages and discussions. This feature intelligently condenses the chat history while preserving all critical information and key details needed for maintaining conversation continuity. Useful for managing token limits and improving performance in lengthy conversations without losing important context or context awareness.

features.name: /resume
features.summary_ja: 前回のセッションを再開
features.description_ja: 終了したセッションを再開して続きから作業を再開。
features.summary_en: Resume a previous session to continue working where you left off.
features.description_en: Resume a previously ended session to continue your work from where it was interrupted. This feature allows you to seamlessly pick up your conversation and tasks without losing context or progress. Perfect for situations where you need to take a break and come back to finish what you were working on, maintaining all previous interactions and outputs in the same session.

features.name: /security-review
features.summary_ja: セキュリティレビューを実施
features.description_ja: 現在のブランチの変更内容に対してセキュリティ観点のレビューを実行。
features.summary_en: Perform a security review of the current branch changes from a security perspective.
features.description_en: Executes a comprehensive security review of the changes in the current branch. This feature analyzes the code modifications with a focus on identifying potential security vulnerabilities, misconfigurations, and best practice violations. It provides detailed feedback on security concerns such as authentication issues, data exposure risks, injection vulnerabilities, and other security-related problems that may be present in the changes.

features.name: /plugin
features.summary_ja: プラグインを管理
features.description_ja: プラグインのインストール・アンインストール・更新・一覧表示・エラー確認を行う。Marketplace からのインストールや --plugin-dir で読み込んだプラグインの管理に使う。
features.summary_en: Manage plugins for installation, uninstallation, updates, listing, and error checking.
features.description_en: Manage plugins with comprehensive operations including installation, uninstallation, updates, listing, and error verification. This command handles plugins from the Marketplace as well as those loaded via the --plugin-dir option. Use it to install new plugins, remove unwanted ones, update existing plugins to newer versions, view all installed plugins, and diagnose any plugin-related errors or issues.

features.name: /skills
features.summary_ja: 利用可能なスキルを一覧・検索
features.description_ja: インストール済みのスキルを一覧表示。テキスト入力でフィルタリング可能。スキルを選択するとプロンプトに `/skill-name` が補完される。
features.summary_en: List and search available skills with text filtering to quickly find and insert skill names into prompts.
features.description_en: Display all installed skills in a searchable list. Filter skills using text input to narrow down results. When you select a skill, its name is automatically completed in the prompt as `/skill-name`. This feature streamlines the process of discovering and applying available skills to your work.

features.name: /mcp
features.summary_ja: MCPサーバーの接続状態を確認
features.description_ja: 接続中の MCP サーバー一覧・ツール数・認証状態を表示。0ツールのサーバーはフラグ表示される。重複URLサーバーの警告も表示。
features.summary_en: Check the connection status of MCP servers
features.description_en: Display a list of connected MCP servers, including the number of tools and authentication status for each. Servers with zero tools are flagged for easy identification. The command also displays warnings for duplicate URL servers, helping you identify potential configuration issues or redundant connections in your MCP server setup.

features.name: /doctor
features.summary_ja: 環境の診断・問題チェック
features.description_ja: MCP サーバーのエラー、無効化されたプラグインの警告、バージョン競合などの問題を診断して表示。トラブルシュートの第一歩。
features.summary_en: Diagnose and check environment for issues
features.description_en: Diagnoses and displays problems with MCP server errors, warnings about disabled plugins, version conflicts, and other configuration issues. Provides comprehensive environment health checks to help identify and troubleshoot problems quickly. This is an essential first step when experiencing unexpected behavior or errors, allowing you to understand what might be preventing Claude Code from functioning properly.

features.name: /usage
features.summary_ja: トークン使用量とコストを確認
features.description_ja: 現在セッションおよび過去の API トークン使用量・コストを表示。/cost と /stats のタブも /usage 内から開ける（v2.1.118 で統合）。
features.summary_en: View token usage and costs for current session and historical API usage data
features.description_en: Displays token usage and cost information for your current session as well as historical API usage data. The /cost and /stats tabs are also accessible from within the /usage interface (consolidated in v2.1.118). This unified view allows you to monitor your API consumption and associated costs in one convenient location, helping you track spending and usage patterns over time.

features.name: /effort
features.summary_ja: Thinking の処理強度を調整
features.description_ja: Claude の思考量（effort）を low / normal / high / max / auto から選択。Opus モデルの xhigh も設定可能。速度と精度のトレードオフを制御。
features.summary_en: Adjust the processing intensity of Claude's thinking capability
features.description_en: Configure Claude's thinking effort level by selecting from low, normal, high, max, or auto. The Opus model also supports xhigh setting. This feature allows you to control the tradeoff between response speed and accuracy based on your specific needs. Higher effort levels enable more extensive reasoning and analysis, while lower levels prioritize faster responses.

features.name: /rename
features.summary_ja: セッションに名前をつける
features.description_ja: 現在のセッションにわかりやすい名前を付ける。ステータスバーに表示され、/resume での再開時に識別しやすくなる。
features.summary_en: Assign a descriptive name to the current session for easier identification in the status bar and when resuming.
features.description_en: Assign a descriptive name to your current session. The name will be displayed in the status bar, making it easier to identify and resume the session later using the /resume command. This is useful when managing multiple sessions simultaneously, as it allows you to quickly recognize which session contains your work without having to open each one.

features.name: /login
features.summary_ja: OAuth 認証を再実行
features.description_ja: トークン期限切れ・認証エラー時に OAuth ログインを再実行。CLAUDE_CODE_OAUTH_TOKEN 環境変数が設定されていてもディスク認証に切り替えられる。
features.summary_en: Re-execute OAuth authentication for expired tokens or authentication errors.
features.description_en: Re-executes OAuth login when token expiration or authentication errors occur. Even if the CLAUDE_CODE_OAUTH_TOKEN environment variable is set, you can switch to disk-based authentication by using this command. This is useful for refreshing credentials or recovering from authentication failures without restarting the application.

features.name: /permissions
features.summary_ja: 許可・拒否されたコマンドを管理
features.description_ja: Auto モードで拒否されたコマンドの履歴を確認・リトライ。許可ルールの追加・削除も可能。Recent タブで直近の許可状況を確認。
features.summary_en: Manage permitted and denied commands with approval history and retry functionality
features.description_en: View and manage command permissions in Auto mode. Check the history of denied commands and retry them as needed. Add or remove permission rules to customize your approval workflow. The Recent tab displays your latest permission decisions and status updates, giving you quick access to recent approval activity and making it easy to track command authorization patterns.

features.name: /add-dir
features.summary_ja: 作業ディレクトリを追加
features.description_ja: 現在のセッションに追加のディレクトリを読み込む。--remember オプションで永続化可能。複数リポジトリにまたがる作業に便利。
features.summary_en: Add additional directories to the current session for multi-repository workflows with optional persistent storage.
features.description_en: Load additional directories into the current session for working across multiple repositories. Use the --remember option to persist these directory additions across future sessions. This feature is particularly useful when you need to work with code spread across multiple repositories simultaneously, allowing you to reference and edit files in different locations without switching contexts or managing multiple sessions.

features.name: /branch
features.summary_ja: セッションをブランチ（分岐）する
features.description_ja: 現在のセッションをフォークして別の方向を試す。分岐したセッションは /resume で再開可能。実験的な変更を本流に影響させずに試すのに使う。
features.summary_en: Branch the current session to explore alternative directions without affecting the main conversation flow.
features.description_en: Fork the current session to experiment with alternative directions and approaches. Branched sessions can be resumed later using /resume, allowing you to test experimental changes and ideas without impacting the main conversation thread. This is useful for exploring multiple paths, testing different strategies, or keeping experimental modifications separate from your primary work while maintaining the ability to return to any branch at any time.

features.name: /copy
features.summary_ja: 最後の応答をクリップボードにコピー
features.description_ja: Claude の直前の応答をクリップボードにコピー。マークダウン形式で GitHub・Notion・Slack に貼り付けるのに最適。tmux 環境でも動作（/terminal-setup 要設定）。
features.summary_en: Copy Claude's last response to clipboard in markdown format for easy sharing
features.description_en: Copies Claude's previous response directly to your clipboard in markdown format, making it perfect for pasting into GitHub, Notion, Slack, and other platforms. The copied content preserves formatting and structure, ensuring compatibility across various applications. Works seamlessly in tmux environments with proper configuration using the /terminal-setup command.

features.name: /remote-control
features.summary_ja: ブラウザ・スマホからセッションを継続
features.description_ja: CLI セッションを claude.ai/code に接続し、ブラウザやスマートフォンから作業を引き継げる。Remote Control 接続中はセッションカラーも同期される。
features.summary_en: Continue your CLI session from browser or mobile using Remote Control to seamlessly switch between devices.
features.description_en: Connect your CLI session to claude.ai/code and seamlessly continue your work from a web browser or smartphone. Remote Control allows you to maintain context and switch between devices without interruption. When Remote Control is active, the session color is synchronized across all connected devices, making it easy to identify which session you're working with. This feature enables flexible workflows where you can start coding on one device and continue on another.

features.name: /terminal-setup
features.summary_ja: ターミナル環境を最適化
features.description_ja: Claude Code が最適動作するようターミナルを設定。iTerm2 のクリップボードアクセス許可・スクロール感度調整などを自動設定する。
features.summary_en: Optimize terminal environment for Claude Code with automatic configuration of iTerm2 clipboard permissions and scroll sensitivity settings.
features.description_en: Configures your terminal environment for optimal Claude Code performance. Automatically sets up iTerm2 clipboard access permissions and adjusts scroll sensitivity to ensure smooth interaction between Claude Code and your terminal. This feature streamlines the initial setup process, eliminating manual configuration steps and ensuring all necessary terminal preferences are properly configured for the best user experience.

features.name: /reload-plugins
features.summary_ja: プラグインをリロード
features.description_ja: インストール済みプラグインを再読み込み。プラグインを編集・更新した後に変更を即反映させる。依存パッケージの自動インストールも行う。
features.summary_en: Reload installed plugins to immediately reflect any edits or updates made, including automatic installation of dependencies.
features.description_en: Reloads all installed plugins to immediately apply any changes made to them. Use this command after editing or updating plugins to ensure modifications take effect without restarting. The command also automatically installs any required dependency packages, streamlining the plugin update workflow and ensuring all necessary components are properly configured.

features.name: /color
features.summary_ja: セッションのアクセントカラーを設定
features.description_ja: 現在のセッションのUI色を変更。引数なしで実行するとランダムに選択。Remote Control 接続時は claude.ai/code にも同期される。
features.summary_en: Set the accent color for the current session's user interface.
features.description_en: Change the UI color of the current session. When executed without arguments, a random color is automatically selected. When connected via Remote Control, the color preference is synchronized with claude.ai/code as well. This command provides an easy way to customize your visual experience during your session.

features.name: /loop
features.summary_ja: プロンプトを定期実行スケジュール
features.description_ja: 指定した間隔でプロンプトやスラッシュコマンドを繰り返し実行。/loop 5m デプロイ確認 のように使う。Esc でキャンセル可能。`/proactive` はエイリアス（v2.1.105）。Bedrock/Vertex でも利用可。

examples.title: Check deployment status every 5 minutes
examples.code: /loop 5m デプロイ状態を確認して

features.summary_en: Schedule prompts and slash commands to run repeatedly at specified intervals
features.description_en: Repeatedly execute prompts or slash commands at specified intervals. Usage example: /loop 5m deploy check. Press Esc to cancel execution. The /proactive command serves as an alias (v2.1.105). Also available on Bedrock and Vertex AI platforms.

features.name: /theme
features.summary_ja: UIテーマを切り替え・カスタマイズ
features.description_ja: テーマピッカーを開きビルトインテーマを選択、または ~/.claude/themes/ のJSONファイルで独自テーマを作成。Auto(match terminal)でダーク/ライト自動切替も可。Ctrl+t でシンタックスハイライトをON/OFF。
features.summary_en: Switch and customize UI themes with built-in options or custom JSON configurations
features.description_en: Open the theme picker to select from built-in themes or create custom themes using JSON files in ~/.claude/themes/. The Auto option matches your terminal's dark or light mode automatically. Toggle syntax highlighting on and off with Ctrl+t. Customize colors, fonts, and UI appearance to suit your preferences with full control over theme configurations.

features.name: /stats
features.summary_ja: APIトークン使用統計を表示
features.description_ja: お気に入りモデル・使用量グラフ・使用ストリーク等の詳細統計を表示。v2.1.118 以降は /usage の Stats タブへのショートカットとして動作。r キーで Last 7 days / Last 30 days / All time を切替。
features.summary_en: Display API token usage statistics including favorite models, usage graphs, and usage streaks.
features.description_en: Shows detailed statistics including favorite models, usage graphs, and usage streaks. From v2.1.118 onwards, it functions as a shortcut to the Stats tab in /usage. Press the r key to switch between Last 7 days, Last 30 days, and All time views for flexible analysis of your API token consumption patterns.

features.name: /feedback
features.summary_ja: フィードバックをAnthropicに送信
features.description_ja: バグ報告・機能要望をAnthropicに直接送信し、GitHub issue URL も生成。認証状態によって利用不可の場合はメニューにその旨が表示される。長い説明文も正しく処理される（v2.1.14 修正済）。
features.summary_en: Send feedback and bug reports to Anthropic with automatic GitHub issue URL generation
features.description_en: Send bug reports and feature requests directly to Anthropic with automatic GitHub issue URL generation. The menu displays an unavailable status when the feature cannot be used due to authentication requirements. Long explanation texts are properly handled (fixed in v2.1.14). This command streamlines the feedback process by integrating issue tracking and direct communication with Anthropic's development team.

features.name: /voice
features.summary_ja: 音声入力（ボイスモード）を切替
features.description_ja: 音声でプロンプトを入力するボイスモードをON/OFF。有効化時に認識言語を表示し、未対応言語は警告。Remote Control セッションでも動作。認証プランによっては非表示になる。
features.summary_en: Toggle voice input mode to enable or disable voice-based prompt entry.
features.description_en: Enable or disable voice mode for entering prompts using voice input. When activated, displays the recognized language and shows warnings for unsupported languages. Functions in Remote Control sessions as well. May be hidden depending on the authentication plan.

features.name: /tui
features.summary_ja: フリッカーフリーなフルスクリーンレンダラーに切替
features.description_ja: /tui fullscreen で代替レンダラーに切り替える。フリッカーなし・低メモリ使用量・マウスサポート・選択時の自動コピーを備える。worktree内セッションでも利用可能。
features.summary_en: Switch to a flicker-free fullscreen renderer with enhanced performance and mouse support
features.description_en: Use /tui fullscreen to switch to an alternative renderer that eliminates flickering, reduces memory usage, and provides enhanced features including mouse support and automatic selection copying. This fullscreen renderer is available even within worktree sessions, making it a versatile option for improved terminal rendering performance across different work environments.

features.name: /extra-usage
features.summary_ja: 追加API利用を有効化するダイアログを開く
features.description_ja: プランの使用量上限を超えた追加API利用を有効化する。有効化後は /fast が即座に使用可能になる。VS Code および Remote Control（ブラウザ・スマホ）からも利用可能。
features.summary_en: Opens a dialog to enable additional API usage beyond the plan's limit.
features.description_en: Enables additional API usage when exceeding your plan's usage quota. Once enabled, /fast becomes immediately available for use. This feature is accessible from VS Code and Remote Control (browser and mobile). After activation, you can continue using API calls beyond your standard plan limits without interruption.

features.name: /rewind
features.summary_ja: 会話を巻き戻してコード変更を取り消す
features.description_ja: ピッカーで任意のポイントを選択して会話を巻き戻し、コード変更も元に戻せる。/undo はエイリアス。VS Code では Esc×2 でも起動可能。
features.summary_en: Rewind the conversation to undo code changes by selecting any point in the chat history.
features.description_en: Rewind the conversation to any previous point using an interactive picker, which also reverts associated code changes. The /undo command serves as an alias for this feature. In VS Code, you can also trigger the rewind picker by pressing Escape twice. This is useful for undoing multiple changes at once or returning to a specific state in your conversation and code editing session.

features.name: /upgrade
features.summary_ja: Claude Maxプランへスムーズにアップグレード
features.description_ja: Claude Max プランへの切り替えダイアログを開く。現在の認証設定で利用できない場合は自動的に非表示になる。レート制限時にサジェストされる場合がある。
features.summary_en: Smoothly upgrade to the Claude Max plan with a dedicated dialog for plan switching and management.
features.description_en: Opens a dialog to switch to the Claude Max plan. The dialog is automatically hidden if unavailable with the current authentication settings. This command may be suggested when you encounter rate limits, helping you upgrade to access higher usage tiers and additional features available with Claude Max.

features.name: /exit
features.summary_ja: セッションを終了してアーカイブ
features.description_ja: 現在のセッションを終了しアーカイブする。Remote Control（ブラウザ・スマホ）からも実行可能。終了時にセッションが確実に保存される。
features.summary_en: End and archive the current session. Executable from Remote Control on browser or mobile devices.
features.description_en: Terminates the current session and archives it for future reference. This command can be executed not only from the main interface but also from Remote Control on browsers and mobile devices. When the session ends, it is guaranteed to be saved automatically, ensuring no data loss. This feature is useful for cleanly concluding work sessions and maintaining organized session history.

features.name: /export
features.summary_ja: 会話をファイルにエクスポート
features.description_ja: 現在の会話を外部ファイルに書き出す。絶対パスや ~ も指定可能で、完了後にファイルの全パスを表示。会話の共有や記録保存に使う。
features.summary_en: Export the current conversation to a file for sharing and archival purposes.
features.description_en: Exports the current conversation to an external file. Supports absolute paths and tilde (~) expansion for home directory references. After successful export, displays the complete file path. Useful for sharing conversations with others, maintaining records, or backing up important discussion threads. You can specify a custom file path or use the default location.

features.name: /ultrareview
features.summary_ja: クラウドで並列マルチエージェントコードレビュー
features.description_ja: クラウド上でマルチエージェントを並列実行し包括的なコードレビューを行う。引数なしで現在ブランチをレビュー、`/ultrareview <PR番号>` でGitHub PRを対象指定。`claude ultrareview` でCIからの非対話実行も可。
features.summary_en: Parallel multi-agent code review executed in the cloud for comprehensive analysis
features.description_en: Execute multiple agents in parallel on the cloud to perform comprehensive code reviews. Review the current branch without arguments, or target a specific GitHub PR using `/ultrareview <PR number>`. For non-interactive execution from CI pipelines, use `claude ultrareview`. This feature leverages parallel agent execution to provide thorough and detailed code analysis across multiple dimensions.

features.name: /plan
features.summary_ja: プランモードをプロンプトから直接起動
features.description_ja: プランモード（読み取り専用計画モード）をスラッシュコマンドで直接有効化する。説明文を引数に渡すと `/plan 認証バグを修正` のように即座に計画を開始できる。Shift+Tab でも同様に切り替え可能。
features.summary_en: Directly activate plan mode from prompts using the /plan slash command for read-only planning
features.description_en: Enable plan mode (read-only planning mode) directly through the /plan slash command. Pass a description as an argument to instantly begin planning, such as `/plan Fix authentication bug`. This allows you to start structured planning immediately without additional steps. You can also toggle plan mode using Shift+Tab for quick access. Plan mode provides a focused environment for organizing and outlining your approach before implementation.

features.name: /tasks
features.summary_ja: バックグラウンドタスクの状態を管理・確認
features.description_ja: バックグラウンドで実行中のタスクの状態を確認・管理するダイアログを開く。タスクが1つのみの場合は直接タスク詳細に遷移する。remote session URL なども確認できる。
features.summary_en: Manage and monitor the status of background tasks currently running in the system.
features.description_en: Opens a dialog to view and manage the status of tasks running in the background. If only one task is present, it navigates directly to the task details view. This feature allows you to check various task information including the remote session URL and other relevant details about ongoing background operations.

features.name: /btw
features.summary_ja: 応答生成中にサイドクエスチョンを割り込ませる
features.description_ja: Claudeが応答を生成中に `/btw 質問` と入力してサイドの質問を差し込める。貼り付けたテキストも含めて処理され、メインの応答を中断せずに別の問いを解決できる。

examples.title: Side Question
examples.code: /btw この関数の引数の型は？

features.summary_en: Interrupt Claude's response generation with side questions using the /btw command
features.description_en: Insert side questions while Claude is generating a response by typing `/btw question`. The command allows you to ask follow-up questions without interrupting the main response. Pasted text is also processed alongside your side question, enabling Claude to address alternative inquiries concurrently with the primary response generation.

features.name: /insights
features.summary_ja: セッション履歴からインサイトレポートを生成
features.description_ja: 現在のセッション履歴を分析してインサイトレポートを生成し、レポートファイルへのリンクを返す。ツール呼び出し履歴も含めて処理される。セッションの振り返りや記録保存に使う。
features.summary_en: Generate insight reports from session history
features.description_en: Analyzes the current session history to generate an insight report and returns a link to the report file. Processes the complete conversation including tool call history. Use this feature to review your session activities and maintain records. The generated report provides a comprehensive summary of interactions and key findings from your session.

features.name: /release-notes
features.summary_ja: Claude Codeのリリースノートを確認
features.description_ja: Claude Code の過去バージョンのリリースノートをインタラクティブなバージョンピッカーで閲覧できる（v2.1.92以降）。最新版から任意バージョンを選択して更新内容を確認。
features.summary_en: View Claude Code release notes with an interactive version picker to explore updates from past versions
features.description_en: Browse Claude Code release notes from previous versions using an interactive version picker (v2.1.92 and later). Select any version from the latest release to view detailed update information. This feature allows you to easily navigate through the development history and understand what changes were made in each release, helping you stay informed about feature additions, improvements, and bug fixes across different versions.

features.name: /keybindings
features.summary_ja: カスタムキーバインド設定を開始
features.description_ja: カスタムキーボードショートカットの設定ガイドを表示。コンテキストごとのキーバインド設定・コードシーケンス作成・~/.claude/keybindings.json の編集方法を案内する（v2.1.18で追加）。
features.summary_en: Begin configuring custom keyboard shortcuts and keybindings for Claude.
features.description_en: Displays a configuration guide for setting up custom keyboard shortcuts. Provides instructions for context-specific keybinding configuration, code sequence creation, and editing methods for ~/.claude/keybindings.json file. Users can customize their keyboard experience to match their preferences and workflow. Added in version 2.1.18.

features.name: /sandbox
features.summary_ja: サンドボックス実行環境を管理
features.description_ja: サンドボックス環境の状態を確認するタブ付きダイアログを表示。Dependencies タブで依存関係のインストール状況と手順を確認できる。Tab/矢印キーでタブ切替が可能。
features.summary_en: Manage and monitor the sandbox execution environment status and configuration.
features.description_en: Displays a tabbed dialog for checking the sandbox environment state. The Dependencies tab allows you to verify the installation status of dependencies and view setup instructions. Navigate between tabs using Tab or arrow keys for easy access to different environment management options.

features.name: /claude-api
features.summary_ja: Claude API開発を支援するスキルを起動
features.description_ja: Claude API・Anthropic SDK を使ったアプリ開発を支援するスキル（v2.1.69で追加）。Managed Agents、エージェント設計パターン、ツール設計・コンテキスト管理・キャッシング戦略のガイダンスを提供。
features.summary_en: Activate skills to support Claude API development using Claude API and Anthropic SDK.
features.description_en: A skill set that supports application development using Claude API and Anthropic SDK (added in v2.1.69). Provides comprehensive guidance on Managed Agents, agent design patterns, tool design, context management, and caching strategies. Enables developers to build robust and efficient AI-powered applications by offering best practices and architectural recommendations for implementing Claude-based solutions.

features.name: /debug
features.summary_ja: デバッグログをセッション中に切り替え
features.description_ja: 現在のセッションのデバッグログをミッドセッションで切替（v2.1.30追加・v2.1.71更新）。デフォルトでは記録されないデバッグログをオンにしてトラブルシュートに使う。Claudeによるセッション診断にも対応。
features.summary_en: Toggle debug logging on and off during your current session for troubleshooting purposes.
features.description_en: Toggle debug logging mid-session for your current conversation (added in v2.1.30, updated in v2.1.71). Enable debug logs that are normally disabled to troubleshoot issues and diagnose problems. Claude can analyze session diagnostics to help identify and resolve issues. Use this command when you need detailed logging information to understand what's happening during your session.

features.name: /todos
features.summary_ja: 現在のTODOアイテム一覧を表示
features.description_ja: TodoWriteツールで記録された現在のセッションのTODOアイテムをオーバーレイで一覧表示（v1.0.94で追加）。pending/in_progress/completed の進捗状態を確認できる。
features.summary_en: Display a list of current TODO items in an overlay during the session.
features.description_en: Displays an overlay list of TODO items recorded in the current session using the TodoWrite tool (added in v1.0.94). You can check the progress status of each item: pending, in_progress, or completed. This feature provides a quick overview of all your tasks and their current states without interrupting your workflow.

features.name: /recap
features.summary_ja: セッション再開時の作業コンテキストを要約
features.description_ja: セッションに戻った際に直前の作業内容のコンテキストを提供するリキャップ機能（v2.1.108追加）。/config で自動表示を設定でき、テレメトリ無効時は CLAUDE_CODE_ENABLE_AWAY_SUMMARY 環境変数で強制有効化可能。
features.summary_en: Summarize work context when resuming a session to provide continuity and recall of previous tasks.
features.description_en: Recap feature that provides context of recent work when returning to a session (added in v2.1.108). Automatic display can be configured via /config, and when telemetry is disabled, the CLAUDE_CODE_ENABLE_AWAY_SUMMARY environment variable can be used to forcefully enable the feature. This helps maintain continuity and ensures you quickly understand where you left off.

features.name: /less-permission-prompts
features.summary_ja: 許可プロンプト削減の allowlist を自動提案
features.description_ja: 過去のトランスクリプトをスキャンして読み取り専用のBash・MCPツール呼び出しパターンを検出し、`.claude/settings.json` の許可リストとして優先順に提案するスキル（v2.1.111で追加）。
features.summary_en: Automatically suggests an allowlist for reducing permission prompts based on transcript analysis
features.description_en: A skill that scans past transcripts to detect read-only Bash and MCP tool invocation patterns, then proposes them in priority order as an allowlist for `.claude/settings.json`. This feature automatically identifies safe, read-only operations that have been previously executed and suggests them as approved permissions, reducing the need for repeated permission prompts. Added in v2.1.111.

features.name: /setup-bedrock
features.summary_ja: Amazon Bedrock接続を対話形式でセットアップ
features.description_ja: Amazon Bedrock 経由でClaudeを利用するための設定を対話形式で実施（v2.1.111改善）。CLAUDE_CONFIG_DIR 設定時は実際のパスを表示し、既存ピンからモデル候補を提案、対応モデルでは1Mコンテキストオプションも提示。/setup-vertex も同様。
features.summary_en: Interactively set up Amazon Bedrock connection for Claude integration
features.description_en: Configure Claude usage through Amazon Bedrock in interactive mode (improved in v2.1.111). When CLAUDE_CONFIG_DIR is set, displays the actual path. Proposes model candidates from existing pins and presents the 1M context window option for compatible models. The /setup-vertex command works similarly.

features.name: /fast
features.summary_ja: Opus 4.6の高速応答モードを切り替え
features.description_ja: Claude Opus 4.6 ベースの高速応答モード（Fast Mode）をON/OFFする。サードパーティプロバイダーでは利用不可で「not available」と表示される。/extra-usage 有効化後は即座に使用可能になる（v2.1.37修正）。
features.summary_en: Toggle fast response mode for Claude Opus 4.6
features.description_en: Enable or disable Fast Mode, a high-speed response mode based on Claude Opus 4.6. This feature is unavailable for third-party providers and will display "not available". After enabling /extra-usage, Fast Mode becomes immediately accessible (fixed in v2.1.37). Fast Mode provides quicker responses while maintaining quality, making it ideal for time-sensitive tasks and rapid iterations.

features.name: /focus
features.summary_ja: フルスクリーンTUIのフォーカスビューを切り替え
features.description_ja: フルスクリーンレンダラー（/tui fullscreen）でのフォーカスビューをON/OFFする（v2.1.110追加）。Ctrl+O はノーマル/詳細ビューの切替専用に変更され、フォーカスビューはこのコマンドで制御する。フルスクリーン無効時は有効化方法を案内。
features.summary_en: Toggle focus view in fullscreen TUI mode
features.description_en: Toggle the focus view ON/OFF in the fullscreen renderer (/tui fullscreen). Added in v2.1.110. Ctrl+O is now dedicated exclusively to switching between normal and detailed views, while the focus view is controlled through this command. If fullscreen mode is inactive, the command will guide you on how to enable it.

features.name: /team-onboarding
features.summary_ja: チームメンバー向けオンボーディングガイドを生成
features.description_ja: ローカルの Claude Code 使用履歴をもとに、チームメンバーのランプアップガイドを自動生成する（v2.1.101追加）。プロジェクト固有のコマンドパターンや慣習をまとめたドキュメントを作成し、新規参加者の立ち上がりを支援する。
features.summary_en: Generate onboarding guides for team members based on local Claude Code usage history.
features.description_en: Automatically generates ramp-up guides for team members based on your local Claude Code usage history (added in v2.1.101). Creates documentation that consolidates project-specific command patterns and conventions, helping new team members get up to speed quickly. This feature supports seamless onboarding by capturing and sharing your team's established practices and workflows.

features.name: /install-github-app
features.summary_ja: GitHub App連携をインストール
features.description_ja: Claude Code と GitHub を連携する GitHub App のインストールを対話形式で実施。エラーハンドリングが強化されており（v1.0.7改善）、Esc でダイアログを閉じられる（v2.1.136修正）。GitHub Actions 連携のセットアップに使う。
features.summary_en: Install GitHub App integration to connect Claude Code with GitHub
features.description_en: Interactively install the GitHub App that enables Claude Code integration with GitHub. Features enhanced error handling (v1.0.7 improvement) and allows closing the dialog with Esc key (v2.1.136 fix). This command is used to set up GitHub Actions integration. The installation process guides you through authenticating and authorizing Claude Code to access your GitHub repositories and workflows.

features.name: /simplify
features.summary_ja: 変更コードの品質・効率をレビューして修正
features.description_ja: v2.1.63で追加されたバンドル型スラッシュコマンド。変更されたコードを再利用性・品質・効率の観点でレビューし、検出した問題を修正する。コードレビューと実際のリファクタを一括で行う。
features.summary_en: Review and refactor changed code for quality, reusability, and efficiency improvements
features.description_en: A bundled slash command added in v2.1.63 that reviews modified code from the perspectives of reusability, quality, and efficiency. It identifies issues and applies fixes in a single operation, combining code review and actual refactoring. This command streamlines the code improvement process by automatically detecting and correcting quality problems in your changes.

features.name: /goal
features.summary_ja: 完了条件を設定して複数ターンを自動実行
features.description_ja: 完了条件をClaudeに設定し、条件が満たされるまで複数ターンにわたって自動実行する（v2.1.139追加）。インタラクティブ・--print・Remote Control のすべてで動作。実行中は経過時間・ターン数・トークン数をオーバーレイパネルでリアルタイム表示。

examples.title: Execution with completion condition
examples.code: /goal テストがすべて通るまで修正を続けて

features.summary_en: Set completion conditions and automatically execute multiple turns until the goal is achieved.
features.description_en: Set completion conditions for Claude and automatically execute multiple turns until those conditions are met (added in v2.1.139). Works across all modes: interactive, --print, and Remote Control. During execution, an overlay panel displays elapsed time, turn count, and token usage in real-time.

features.name: /scroll-speed
features.summary_ja: マウスホイールのスクロール速度を調整
features.description_ja: マウスホイールのスクロール速度をリアルタイムプレビュー付きで調整するコマンド（v2.1.139追加）。カーソルや VS Code でのスクロール速度問題にも対応しており、トラックパッドとマウスホイールのスクロール量を別々に制御できる。
features.summary_en: Adjust mouse wheel scroll speed with real-time preview and separate trackpad control
features.description_en: Command to adjust mouse wheel scroll speed with real-time preview (added in v2.1.139). Addresses scroll speed issues with cursors and VS Code, allowing separate control of trackpad and mouse wheel scroll amounts. Fine-tune scrolling behavior for optimal productivity across different input devices with immediate visual feedback.

features.name: /schedule
features.summary_ja: 定期スケジュールのリモートエージェントを管理
features.description_ja: cron スケジュールで定期実行するリモートエージェント（ルーティン）の作成・一覧・実行を管理する（v2.1.139）。claude.ai 認証が必要で、ANTHROPIC_API_KEY 設定時は Remote Control・claude.ai MCP コネクタと同様に無効化される。
features.summary_en: Manage remote agents for scheduled execution using cron-based recurring routines
features.description_en: Create, list, and manage remote agents (routines) that execute on cron schedules (v2.1.139). This feature requires claude.ai authentication and is disabled when ANTHROPIC_API_KEY is configured, similar to Remote Control and claude.ai MCP connectors. Use this to automate recurring tasks and manage scheduled agent executions through a convenient interface.

features.name: /ultraplan
features.summary_ja: クラウドセッションで計画をリファイン
features.description_ja: プランモードから「Refine with Ultraplan」として起動できるクラウドベースの計画精緻化機能（v2.1.101追加）。デフォルトのクラウド環境を自動生成してリモートセッションURLをトランスクリプトに表示。組織またはAuth設定でクラウドに到達できない場合は非表示になる。
features.summary_en: Refine plans in cloud sessions with advanced planning capabilities and remote collaboration features.
features.description_en: A cloud-based plan refinement feature accessible from Plan mode as "Refine with Ultraplan" (added in v2.1.101). It automatically generates a default cloud environment and displays the remote session URL in the transcript for collaborative planning. The feature is hidden if your organization or Auth settings prevent access to the cloud infrastructure.

features.name: /powerup
features.summary_ja: インタラクティブな機能チュートリアルを起動
features.description_ja: Claude Code の各機能をアニメーションデモ付きのインタラクティブなレッスン形式で学べる（v2.1.90追加）。ハンズオン形式で機能の使い方を習得できる。
features.summary_en: Launch interactive feature tutorials with animated demonstrations for hands-on learning of Claude Code capabilities.
features.description_en: Learn Claude Code features through interactive, hands-on lessons with animated demonstrations. This feature provides tutorial-based learning experiences that help you master various functionality in an engaging format. Each lesson combines visual animations with practical exercises to ensure you understand how to use Claude Code's features effectively. Added in v2.1.90, this interactive approach makes it easier to discover and master new capabilities.

features.name: /teleport
features.summary_ja: リモートセッションを再開（claude.ai登録者向け）
features.description_ja: claude.ai 登録者向けのリモートセッション再開コマンド（v2.1.0追加）。/remote-env でリモートセッションを設定し、/teleport で再開する。Remote Control との組み合わせで利用可能。
features.summary_en: Resume remote sessions for claude.ai registered users
features.description_en: A remote session resumption command exclusively for claude.ai registered users (added in v2.1.0). Configure a remote session using /remote-env, then resume it with /teleport. This command works in combination with Remote Control functionality. It enables seamless reconnection to previously established remote environments without needing to reconfigure settings.

features.name: /remote-env
features.summary_ja: リモートセッション環境を設定（claude.ai登録者向け）
features.description_ja: claude.ai 登録者向けのリモートセッション設定コマンド（v2.1.0追加）。リモート環境のパラメータを設定し、/teleport でセッションを再開する際の接続先を定義する。
features.summary_en: Configure remote session environment for claude.ai registered users to manage connection parameters and session endpoints.
features.description_en: Remote session configuration command for claude.ai registered users (added in v2.1.0). This command allows you to set parameters for your remote environment and define the connection destination when resuming sessions with /teleport. Use this to establish and manage your remote session settings, ensuring proper endpoint configuration for seamless session continuity across remote connections.

features.name: /bg
features.summary_ja: バックグラウンドエージェントを起動
features.description_ja: バックグラウンドエージェントをコマンドまたはキーボードショートカット ←← で起動する。起動時に現在の権限モードを引き継ぐ（v2.1.141）。実行中のタスクは /tasks で確認可能。
features.summary_en: Launch a background agent via command or keyboard shortcut to run tasks in the background.
features.description_en: Start a background agent using the /bg command or keyboard shortcut. The agent inherits the current permission mode when launched (v2.1.141). This allows you to run tasks asynchronously without blocking your current workflow. You can monitor all running background tasks using the /tasks command, which provides visibility into active processes and their status.

features.name: /setup-vertex
features.summary_ja: Google Vertex AI接続を対話形式でセットアップ
features.description_ja: Google Cloud Vertex AI 経由でClaudeを利用するための設定を対話形式で実施（v2.1.111改善）。CLAUDE_CONFIG_DIR 設定時は実際のパスを表示し、既存ピンからモデル候補を提案、対応モデルでは1Mコンテキストオプションも提示。
features.summary_en: Interactively set up Google Vertex AI connection for Claude
features.description_en: Configure Claude usage through Google Cloud Vertex AI in an interactive setup process (improved in v2.1.111). When CLAUDE_CONFIG_DIR is configured, displays the actual path. Proposes model candidates from existing pins and presents 1M context options for supported models. Streamlines the authentication and model selection workflow for seamless integration with Google Cloud's generative AI platform.

features.name: /chrome
features.summary_ja: ブラウザをClaudeから直接操作（Beta）
features.description_ja: Claude in Chrome拡張機能（claude.ai/chrome）と連携し、ブラウザを直接Claude Codeから操作できるベータ機能（v2.0.72追加）。認証設定によっては非表示になる場合がある。
features.summary_en: Direct browser control from Claude (Beta)
features.description_en: A beta feature (added in v2.0.72) that integrates with the Claude in Chrome extension (claude.ai/chrome) to enable direct browser manipulation from Claude Code. This allows you to control your browser directly through Claude's interface. The feature may be hidden depending on your authentication settings.

features.name: /commit-push-pr
features.summary_ja: コミット・プッシュ・PR作成を一括実行
features.description_ja: git commit・push・PR作成を一括実行するバンドルスキル。MCP経由でSlackが設定されている場合はPR URLを自動的にSlackチャンネルに投稿する（v2.1.20で変更）。
features.summary_en: Execute git commit, push, and pull request creation in a single batch operation
features.description_en: A bundle skill that executes git commit, push, and PR creation all at once. When Slack is configured via MCP, the PR URL is automatically posted to the configured Slack channel (changed in v2.1.20). This streamlines the workflow of committing changes, pushing them to the remote repository, and creating a pull request without running multiple separate commands.

features.name: /web-setup
features.summary_ja: GitHub App Web接続をセットアップ
features.description_ja: Claude Code とGitHub AppのWeb接続を設定するダイアログ（v2.1.136追加）。既存の接続を上書きする前に警告を表示する（v2.1.142）。Escキーでダイアログを閉じられる。
features.summary_en: Set up GitHub App web connection for Claude Code integration
features.description_en: Dialog for configuring the web connection between Claude Code and GitHub App (added in v2.1.136). Displays a warning before overwriting existing connections (v2.1.142). The dialog can be closed by pressing the Escape key. This feature enables seamless authentication and integration with GitHub repositories through a web-based setup process.

features.name: /update
features.summary_ja: Claude Codeをセッション内から最新版に更新
features.description_ja: セッション内から Claude Code を最新バージョンに更新するコマンド。`claude update` CLI サブコマンドと同等の更新を対話セッションから実行可能。worktree 内セッションでも動作（v2.1.116 修正）。`DISABLE_UPDATES` 環境変数で全更新パスを無効化可能。
features.summary_en: Update Claude Code to the latest version from within a session
features.description_en: A command to update Claude Code to the latest version directly from an interactive session, equivalent to the `claude update` CLI subcommand. Executes the same update functionality available from the command line without leaving your session. Works in worktree sessions as well (fixed in v2.1.116). All update paths can be disabled using the `DISABLE_UPDATES` environment variable when needed.

features.name: /fork
features.summary_ja: /branch の旧コマンド名（エイリアス）
features.description_ja: v2.1.77 で `/branch` にリネームされた旧コマンド名。エイリアスとして引き続き動作し、セッションをフォークして別の方向を試すことができる。分岐したセッションは /resume で再開可能。新しい記法では `/branch` を使用することを推奨。
features.summary_en: Legacy command name (alias) for /branch. Continues to work as an alias for backward compatibility.
features.description_en: The previous command name for /branch, renamed in v2.1.77. This command continues to function as an alias for backward compatibility. It allows you to fork a session and explore alternative directions. Forked sessions can be resumed using /resume. For new usage, /branch is the recommended command.

features.name: /batch
features.summary_ja: バッチ操作を一括実行するバンドル型スラッシュコマンド
features.description_ja: v2.1.63 で /simplify と同時に追加されたバンドル型スラッシュコマンド。CHANGELOG には「Added /simplify and /batch bundled slash commands」の一行のみ記載。詳細は /release-notes で v2.1.63 のリリースノートを参照。
features.summary_en: A bundled slash command for executing batch operations all at once.
features.description_en: A bundled slash command added in v2.1.63 alongside /simplify. The CHANGELOG entry simply states "Added /simplify and /batch bundled slash commands" with no additional details provided. For comprehensive information about this feature, refer to the v2.1.63 release notes in /release-notes.

features.name: Bash
features.summary_ja: シェルコマンドを実行
features.description_ja: シェル環境でコマンドを実行。npm install、git操作、ビルドコマンドなどに使う。最大10分のタイムアウト指定可能。
features.summary_en: Execute shell commands in a bash environment for running npm, git operations, and build commands.
features.description_en: Execute commands in a shell environment. Useful for running npm install, performing git operations, executing build commands, and other shell-based tasks. Supports a maximum timeout of 10 minutes for command execution, allowing you to run longer-running processes while maintaining control over execution time limits.

features.name: Read
features.summary_ja: ファイルを読み取り
features.description_ja: ファイルの内容を読み取る。テキスト、PDF、画像、Jupyter notebookに対応。行番号付き、オフセット指定可能。
features.summary_en: Read file contents
features.description_en: Read the contents of files with support for text, PDF, images, and Jupyter notebooks. Display line numbers and specify custom offsets for precise content retrieval. This feature enables flexible file reading with various formats and navigation options.

features.name: Write
features.summary_ja: 新規ファイルを作成
features.description_ja: ローカルファイルシステムにファイルを作成・上書き。既存ファイルは事前に Read 必須。

examples.title: Create new file
examples.code: Write: 新ファイルを書き出す

features.summary_en: Create new files in the local filesystem with write and overwrite capabilities.
features.description_en: Creates or overwrites files in the local filesystem. This feature enables writing content to new or existing files. For existing files, a Read operation must be performed first to verify the file contents before writing. This ensures safe file modification by requiring prior knowledge of what will be replaced. Use this feature to persist data, generate new files, or update file contents in your project directory.

features.name: Edit
features.summary_ja: 既存ファイルを部分編集
features.description_ja: old_string と new_string を指定して文字列置換。差分のみ送信できるので Write より効率的。
features.summary_en: Partially edit existing files by specifying old and new strings for efficient character replacement.
features.description_en: Edit enables efficient partial file modifications by specifying old_string and new_string parameters for character replacement. Unlike the Write operation which sends entire file contents, Edit only transmits the differences, making it significantly more efficient for targeted edits. This approach reduces token usage and improves performance when making localized changes to existing files.

features.name: MultiEdit
features.summary_ja: 1ファイルに複数編集を一括適用
features.description_ja: 複数の Edit 操作を同時にトランザクションで適用。1つでも失敗すると全てロールバック。
features.summary_en: Apply multiple edits to a single file in batch with transactional consistency and automatic rollback on failure.
features.description_en: Execute multiple Edit operations simultaneously within a single transaction. All edits are applied atomically to maintain consistency. If any individual edit operation fails, the entire transaction is rolled back, ensuring the file remains in a valid state. This feature is useful for complex refactoring operations that require coordinated changes across multiple locations in a file.

features.name: Glob
features.summary_ja: パターンでファイル検索
features.description_ja: ワイルドカードパターン（src/**/*.ts等）でファイルを高速検索。
features.summary_en: Fast file search using wildcard patterns
features.description_en: Search files at high speed using wildcard patterns such as src/**/*.ts. This feature enables efficient file discovery by specifying glob patterns that match multiple files and directories simultaneously. It supports standard glob syntax with wildcards and recursive directory traversal, making it ideal for selecting specific file types or locations within your project structure.

features.name: Grep
features.summary_ja: ファイル内容を全文検索
features.description_ja: ripgrepベースの高速検索。正規表現対応、コンテキスト行表示、ファイル種別フィルタなど多機能。
features.summary_en: Full-text search within files
features.description_en: High-speed search powered by ripgrep. Supports regular expressions, context line display, file type filtering, and more. Efficiently search through large codebases with advanced filtering options. Features include pattern matching, customizable context, and file type exclusions for precise results.

features.name: Task (Agent)
features.summary_ja: サブエージェントを起動
features.description_ja: 別のエージェントを起動して並列タスク実行。Explore/Plan/general-purpose 等の組み込みエージェントを使える。
features.summary_en: Launch sub-agents to execute parallel tasks using built-in agents like Explore, Plan, or general-purpose.
features.description_en: Initiates a separate agent to execute tasks in parallel. This feature enables concurrent task processing by leveraging built-in agents such as Explore, Plan, and general-purpose variants. Sub-agents operate independently while coordinating with the parent agent, allowing for efficient multi-threaded task execution. This is particularly useful for breaking down complex workflows into manageable parallel operations that can be executed simultaneously.

features.name: WebSearch
features.summary_ja: Webを検索
features.description_ja: 最新情報を検索。日付・ドメインフィルタ対応。米国限定。
features.summary_en: Search the web for the latest information with support for date and domain filtering. Available in the United States only.
features.description_en: Search the web to find the most current information and updates. This feature supports advanced filtering options including date ranges and specific domain targeting to help you refine your search results. Whether you need recent news, trending topics, or domain-specific information, WebSearch provides access to up-to-date web content. Please note that this feature is currently available exclusively in the United States.

features.name: WebFetch
features.summary_ja: URLを取得して要約
features.description_ja: 指定URLからHTML取得→マークダウン変換→AIが要約。15分キャッシュあり。
features.summary_en: Fetch and summarize content from URLs by converting HTML to markdown and generating AI summaries with 15-minute caching.
features.description_en: WebFetch retrieves HTML content from a specified URL, converts it to markdown format, and uses AI to generate a concise summary. The feature includes a 15-minute cache to optimize repeated requests to the same URL. This streamlines the process of extracting and summarizing web content without manual parsing, making it ideal for quickly understanding documentation, articles, or web pages through automated summarization.

features.name: NotebookEdit
features.summary_ja: Jupyter Notebookセルを編集
features.description_ja: .ipynb ファイルの特定セルを編集・追加・削除。データサイエンス作業向け。
features.summary_en: Edit cells in Jupyter Notebooks
features.description_en: Edit, add, or delete specific cells in .ipynb files. This feature enables seamless manipulation of Jupyter Notebook cells, making it ideal for data science workflows. You can modify cell content, insert new cells, or remove existing ones with precision control. Perfect for automating notebook updates, refactoring analysis code, or programmatically building reproducible data science pipelines.

features.name: TodoWrite
features.summary_ja: タスクリストで進捗管理
features.description_ja: 現在のセッション内のタスク追跡。pending/in_progress/completed の3状態。複雑な作業の整理に。

examples.title: Add tasks
examples.code: TodoWrite: 認証実装、テスト追加

features.summary_en: Manage task progress with a task list tracking pending, in-progress, and completed states.
features.description_en: Track tasks within your current session to organize complex work. TodoWrite maintains three task states: pending for new tasks, in_progress for active work, and completed for finished items. This feature helps break down large projects into manageable steps and keeps you focused on what needs to be done. Perfect for organizing multiple related tasks during a single conversation or coding session.

features.name: SlashCommand
features.summary_ja: 別のスラッシュコマンドを実行
features.description_ja: Claude が他のスラッシュコマンドを呼び出す内部ツール。コマンド連携の基盤。
features.summary_en: Execute another slash command internally. This tool enables Claude to invoke other slash commands for seamless command chaining and workflow automation.
features.description_en: An internal tool that allows Claude to call and execute other slash commands. This feature serves as the foundation for command chaining and inter-command communication. It enables complex workflows by allowing one command to trigger another, creating a modular and composable command system. This is essential for automating multi-step processes and building sophisticated command sequences that work together seamlessly.

features.name: PreToolUse Hook
features.summary_ja: ツール実行前のフック
features.description_ja: ツール実行直前に走るフック。matcher で対象ツール指定、危険コマンドのブロックや事前検証に使える。
features.summary_en: Hook that executes before tool usage, enabling tool matching, blocking dangerous commands, and pre-execution validation.
features.description_en: A hook that runs immediately before tool execution. It allows you to specify target tools using a matcher, making it useful for blocking dangerous commands and performing pre-execution validation. This feature provides a critical checkpoint in the tool execution pipeline, enabling security measures such as preventing risky operations like destructive commands while allowing legitimate tool usage to proceed.

features.name: PostToolUse Hook
features.summary_ja: ツール実行後のフック
features.description_ja: ツール実行直後に走るフック。ログ記録、自動フォーマット、テスト実行などに使う。
features.summary_en: Hook that executes immediately after tool use, enabling logging, formatting, testing, and other post-execution operations.
features.description_en: A hook that runs immediately after tool execution completes. This enables developers to perform post-execution tasks such as logging tool usage, automatically formatting output, running tests, or triggering other automated workflows. Useful for maintaining code quality, tracking tool usage patterns, and ensuring consistent output formatting across different tool implementations.

features.name: Stop Hook
features.summary_ja: Claude応答完了時のフック
features.description_ja: Claudeの応答が終了したときに走るフック。完了通知やセッションログ出力に。
features.summary_en: Hook that executes when Claude finishes generating a response
features.description_en: A hook that runs when Claude's response is complete. Use this to trigger completion notifications, log session data, or perform cleanup tasks after each response. This is useful for tracking conversation history, sending alerts when processing finishes, or executing post-response workflows. The hook executes automatically once Claude finishes generating and sending the full response to the user.

features.name: SubagentStop Hook
features.summary_ja: サブエージェント完了時のフック
features.description_ja: サブエージェント（Task tool）が完了したときに走るフック。
features.summary_en: Hook that executes when a subagent or Task tool completes its execution.
features.description_en: A hook that runs when a subagent (Task tool) completes its execution. This allows you to perform actions or trigger workflows immediately after a subagent finishes processing. Common use cases include logging completion events, notifying other systems, updating status records, or triggering dependent tasks. The hook provides a convenient integration point for monitoring and coordinating multi-agent workflows.

features.name: SessionStart Hook
features.summary_ja: セッション開始時のフック
features.description_ja: Claude Code セッション開始時に走るフック。git pull や初期メッセージ表示に。
features.summary_en: Hook that executes when a Claude Code session starts
features.description_en: A hook that runs at the beginning of each Claude Code session. This feature enables automatic execution of setup tasks such as pulling the latest changes from your git repository or displaying initial messages to the user. Useful for ensuring your development environment is up-to-date and for automating routine initialization procedures at session startup.

features.name: SessionEnd Hook
features.summary_ja: セッション終了時のフック
features.description_ja: セッション終了時に走るフック。コミット忘れ警告、サマリー出力など。
features.summary_en: Hook that executes when a session ends, enabling cleanup tasks like commit verification and summary output.
features.description_en: A hook that runs at the end of a session, allowing you to perform cleanup and notification tasks. Common use cases include warning about uncommitted changes, displaying session summaries, generating reports, or performing final validations. This enables developers to catch forgotten commits before moving on and helps maintain code quality by ensuring important tasks are completed before the session terminates.

features.name: UserPromptSubmit Hook
features.summary_ja: ユーザー入力送信時のフック
features.description_ja: ユーザーがプロンプトを送信した直後に走る。入力内容を加工・追記したり、追加コンテキスト注入に使える。

examples.title: Auto-add translation instructions
examples.code: UserPromptSubmit: 日本語入力に英訳ヒント追加

features.summary_en: Hook that executes immediately after a user submits a prompt, enabling input modification and additional context injection.
features.description_en: A hook that runs immediately after a user submits a prompt. This allows you to process and modify the input content, add supplementary information, or inject additional context before the prompt is processed. Useful for automatically enhancing user inputs with extra instructions, formatting requirements, or contextual data that should accompany every submission.

features.name: PreCompact Hook
features.summary_ja: コンテキスト圧縮直前のフック
features.description_ja: コンテキスト圧縮が走る直前に呼ばれる。圧縮前に重要な情報を保存したい時に。
features.summary_en: Hook that executes immediately before context compression occurs, allowing you to preserve critical information.
features.description_en: A hook that is invoked just before context compression runs. Use this hook when you need to save important information before compression takes effect. This is useful for preserving state, logging data, or performing cleanup operations prior to the context being compacted. The hook provides an opportunity to extract and store any data that might be lost or altered during the compression process.

features.name: Notification Hook
features.summary_ja: 通知イベントのフック
features.description_ja: Claudeが通知を出すタイミング（権限要求等）で走るフック。デスクトップ通知連携などに。
features.summary_en: Hook that executes when Claude triggers notifications, such as permission requests or alerts.
features.description_en: A hook that runs at the moment Claude sends notifications, including permission requests and other alert events. This enables integration with system notification services and desktop notification handlers. Useful for customizing notification behavior, routing alerts to external systems, or triggering additional actions when Claude needs user attention. Commonly used for desktop notification integration on platforms like macOS, enabling seamless notification delivery across your system.

features.name: Plan Mode
features.summary_ja: 読み取り専用の計画モード
features.description_ja: Shift+Tabで切替。コードを書かずに「これからやること」を提案するだけ。実装前のレビューに最適。
features.summary_en: Read-only planning mode for outlining tasks before implementation without writing actual code.
features.description_en: A read-only planning mode that helps you outline what needs to be done before diving into implementation. Toggle it on and off using Shift+Tab. When active, Claude will propose and discuss upcoming tasks without writing any actual code. This mode is particularly useful for pre-implementation code reviews, allowing you to validate your approach and get feedback on your plan before committing to the actual development work.

features.name: Permission Modes
features.summary_ja: ツール実行時の確認制御
features.description_ja: default(都度確認)、acceptEdits(編集自動)、bypassPermissions(全自動)、plan(読取のみ)の4モード。
features.summary_en: Control confirmation requirements when executing tools with four permission modes for different levels of automation.
features.description_en: Four permission modes control how tools are executed and what confirmation is required. The default mode requires confirmation for each tool execution. acceptEdits mode automatically applies tool edits without prompting. bypassPermissions mode fully automates all tool execution and edits. plan mode restricts access to read-only operations and prevents any modifications. These modes allow flexible configuration of automation levels based on security and workflow requirements.

features.name: Output Styles
features.summary_ja: 応答スタイルのカスタマイズ
features.description_ja: Claudeの応答口調・形式を調整。簡潔モード、教育モードなどプリセットあり。
features.summary_en: Customize Claude's response style and tone with preset modes like concise or educational formats.
features.description_en: Adjust Claude's response tone and format to match your preferences. This feature provides preset styles including concise mode for brief answers, educational mode for detailed explanations, and other specialized formats. Easily switch between different communication styles to optimize Claude's output for your specific use case, whether you need quick summaries or comprehensive guidance.

features.name: Headless Mode (--print)
features.summary_ja: 対話なしで一発実行
features.description_ja: --print フラグで対話UIなしに1回だけプロンプトを実行して結果を返す。CIやスクリプト統合に。
features.summary_en: Execute a single prompt without interactive mode using the --print flag for CI and script integration.
features.description_en: Run Claude in headless mode using the --print flag to execute a prompt once without the interactive UI and return the result immediately. This mode is designed for automation, CI/CD pipelines, and script integration scenarios where you need to invoke Claude from command-line tools or automated workflows without engaging the interactive dialogue interface.

features.name: CLAUDE.md
features.summary_ja: プロジェクトガイダンスファイル
features.description_ja: リポジトリ直下に置くと Claude が自動的に読み込むプロジェクトガイダンス。コーディング規約、ディレクトリ構造、注意事項などを書く。
features.summary_en: Project guidance file that Claude automatically reads from repository root to understand coding standards and structure.
features.description_en: A project guidance file placed in the repository root that Claude automatically loads to understand your project. This file contains important information such as coding conventions, directory structure, and special considerations. By documenting these details in CLAUDE.md, you help Claude provide more accurate and contextual assistance when working with your codebase. This ensures consistency and helps Claude follow your project-specific practices and requirements.

features.name: AGENTS.md
features.summary_ja: エージェント定義ファイル
features.description_ja: サブエージェントの挙動を定義。CLAUDE.md と並列で機能する場合あり。

examples.title: File placement
examples.code: プロジェクトルートに配置

features.summary_en: Agent definition file that specifies the behavior and configuration of sub-agents within the system.
features.description_en: The AGENTS.md file defines the behavior and configuration of sub-agents in the system. It functions in parallel with CLAUDE.md, allowing for coordinated multi-agent workflows. This file enables specification of agent-specific parameters, capabilities, and interaction patterns. Sub-agents defined here can operate independently or collaboratively depending on the configuration, making it essential for managing complex agent-based architectures.

features.name: ONBOARDING.md
features.summary_ja: 新規参加者向けガイド
features.description_ja: プロジェクトに初めて触れる人のためのオンボーディング情報。Claude が読み込んでアシストに使う。

examples.title: File Structure
examples.code: プロジェクトルートに配置

features.summary_en: Onboarding guide for new project contributors with essential information for getting started.
features.description_en: Comprehensive onboarding information designed for developers new to the project. This guide helps newcomers understand the project structure, setup process, and key concepts. Claude reads and utilizes this documentation to provide informed assistance to users, ensuring consistent and contextual support throughout the onboarding journey.

features.name: settings.json
features.summary_ja: ユーザー全体の設定ファイル
features.description_ja: ~/.claude/settings.json でグローバル設定。テーマ、フック、許可リスト、環境変数など。
features.summary_en: Global configuration file for Claude user settings
features.description_en: The global settings configuration file located at ~/.claude/settings.json. This file contains user-wide preferences and configurations including theme settings, hook configurations, permission allowlists, and environment variables. It serves as the central location for customizing Claude's behavior and appearance across all sessions.

features.name: settings.local.json
features.summary_ja: プロジェクト固有設定
features.description_ja: .claude/settings.local.json でプロジェクト単位設定。git管理外、個人の許可設定などに。
features.summary_en: Project-specific configuration settings stored locally for individual developer preferences and permissions.
features.description_en: Configure project-specific settings using .claude/settings.local.json file. This local configuration file is excluded from git version control, making it ideal for storing individual developer preferences, personal permission settings, and environment-specific configurations. Each developer can maintain their own settings without affecting other team members' configurations or committing sensitive data to the repository.

features.name: .mcp.json
features.summary_ja: MCPサーバー設定ファイル
features.description_ja: プロジェクトに紐づく MCP サーバーを定義。stdio/SSE/HTTP の各種MCPサーバーを登録できる。
features.summary_en: MCP server configuration file for defining and managing MCP servers associated with your project.
features.description_en: Configuration file for defining MCP servers linked to your project. Supports registration of various types of MCP servers including stdio, SSE, and HTTP protocols. This file allows you to centrally manage and configure multiple MCP server instances, enabling seamless integration of different communication protocols and server configurations within your Claude Code environment.

features.name: Memory System
features.summary_ja: 永続メモリシステム
features.description_ja: ~/.claude/projects/<hash>/memory/ にユーザー嗜好・プロジェクト情報を蓄積。MEMORY.md がインデックス。
features.summary_en: Persistent memory system that accumulates user preferences and project information across sessions.
features.description_en: A persistent memory system that stores user preferences and project-specific information in ~/.claude/projects/<hash>/memory/. The system maintains an indexed structure with MEMORY.md serving as the primary index file. This enables Claude to retain context about user preferences, project details, and other relevant information across multiple conversations and sessions, allowing for more personalized and context-aware interactions within each project workspace.

features.name: @-mentions
features.summary_ja: ファイルを@で参照
features.description_ja: プロンプト内で @path/to/file と書くと、そのファイルが自動的にコンテキストに追加される。
features.summary_en: Reference files using @ mentions to automatically include them in conversation context.
features.description_en: Reference files in your prompts by typing @path/to/file, and that file will be automatically added to the conversation context. This allows Claude to access and analyze specific files without requiring you to manually copy and paste their contents. Simply use the @ symbol followed by the file path to seamlessly incorporate files into your prompts, making it easier to get help with debugging, reviewing, or understanding specific code or documents.

features.name: --continue (-c)
features.summary_ja: 前回のセッションを継続
features.description_ja: claude --continue で直前のセッションをそのまま再開。コンテキストを失わずに続けられる。
features.summary_en: Continue the previous session without losing context. Use claude --continue to resume exactly where you left off.
features.description_en: Resume your previous Claude session seamlessly using the --continue flag. This feature allows you to pick up exactly where you left off without losing any context or conversation history. Simply run claude --continue (or claude -c for short) to restore your last session and maintain continuity in your work. Ideal for long-running projects or conversations that span multiple sessions, ensuring no loss of context or progress.

features.name: --resume (-r)
features.summary_ja: 特定セッションを再開
features.description_ja: claude --resume <session-id> で過去の任意セッションを再開。
features.summary_en: Resume a specific session from your chat history using the session ID or interactive selection.
features.description_en: Resume any past session using the --resume flag followed by a session ID. This allows you to continue previous conversations exactly where you left off. You can specify the session ID directly with claude --resume <session-id>, or use claude --resume without arguments to interactively select from your available sessions. This is useful for continuing long-running projects, revisiting previous discussions, or picking up work from earlier sessions.

features.name: --print (-p)
features.summary_ja: ヘッドレスモードで一発実行
features.description_ja: 対話UIを起動せずプロンプトを実行して結果を出力。スクリプト連携に。
features.summary_en: Execute prompts in headless mode without launching the interactive UI, outputting results directly for script integration.
features.description_en: Runs Claude in headless mode, executing prompts without launching the interactive user interface. Results are output directly to stdout, making this ideal for script integration and automation workflows. This mode allows you to pipe Claude commands into other tools or batch process multiple prompts efficiently without manual interaction.

features.name: --model
features.summary_ja: 使用モデルを起動時に指定
features.description_ja: claude --model claude-opus-4-7 のように、起動時に使用モデルを固定。
features.summary_en: Specify the model to use when starting Claude, allowing you to fix a particular model at launch time.
features.description_en: Allows you to specify which Claude model to use when starting the application. By using the --model flag at launch, you can fix the model selection without needing to change it during the session. For example, you can start Claude with a specific model like claude-opus-4-7 by including the flag in your launch command. This is useful when you want to consistently use a particular model version for all your interactions in that session.

features.name: --add-dir
features.summary_ja: 追加の作業ディレクトリを指定
features.description_ja: Claude のアクセスを通常のcwd以外にも広げる。複数リポジトリを横断する作業に。
features.summary_en: Specify additional working directories to extend Claude's access beyond the current working directory
features.description_en: Extend Claude's file system access beyond the standard current working directory (cwd) to include additional directories. This feature is particularly useful when working across multiple repositories or projects simultaneously, allowing Claude to access and work with files from different locations without requiring manual navigation or copying. Multiple directories can be specified to streamline cross-repository development tasks and improve workflow efficiency.

features.name: Subagent System
features.summary_ja: サブエージェントの仕組み
features.description_ja: メインのClaudeとは別の文脈で動く専門エージェント。Task tool 経由で起動。複雑タスクの並列処理や文脈分離に。
features.summary_en: Specialized agents operating in separate contexts from the main Claude instance, triggered via Task tool for parallel processing and context isolation.
features.description_en: The Subagent System enables specialized agents to operate in isolated contexts independent from the main Claude instance. These subagents are activated through the Task tool, allowing complex tasks to be processed in parallel while maintaining clear context separation. This architecture is particularly useful for handling multifaceted problems that benefit from dedicated, specialized processing without interference from other concurrent operations. Each subagent maintains its own execution context, enabling efficient resource management and improved performance for sophisticated workflows.

features.name: Explore Agent
features.summary_ja: 高速読み取り検索エージェント
features.description_ja: コードを探すための読み取り専用検索エージェント。パターン・キーワード・シンボル検索に最適。並列実行で本体の文脈を消費しない。
features.summary_en: Fast read-only search agent for exploring and discovering code patterns, keywords, and symbols efficiently.
features.description_en: A read-only search agent designed for exploring and locating code within your repository. Optimized for pattern matching, keyword searches, and symbol lookups across your codebase.
