Executes searches in parallel without consuming the main context window, allowing efficient code discovery alongside other operations. Ideal for understanding code structure, finding specific implementations, and navigating large projects.

features.name: Plan Agent
features.summary_ja: 実装計画を設計するエージェント
features.description_ja: タスクの実装戦略を設計。ステップバイステップ計画、重要ファイル特定、アーキテクチャトレードオフ考慮。

examples.title: New Feature Planning
examples.code: Task: subagent_type=Plan で認証機能の実装計画

features.summary_en: An agent that designs implementation plans and strategies for tasks, including step-by-step planning and architecture consideration.
features.description_en: The Plan Agent designs implementation strategies for tasks by creating detailed step-by-step plans, identifying critical files and components, and considering architectural tradeoffs. It helps break down complex implementation requirements into manageable phases, assesses technical dependencies, and recommends optimal approaches for system design. This agent is valuable for planning feature implementations, refactoring efforts, and architectural improvements where thoughtful strategy is essential before execution begins.

features.name: general-purpose Agent
features.summary_ja: 汎用エージェント
features.description_ja: 特化していない汎用エージェント。複雑な調査やマルチステップタスクに使える。
features.summary_en: General-purpose agent without specialization. Ideal for handling complex investigations and multi-step tasks.
features.description_en: A versatile general-purpose agent designed for handling diverse tasks without domain-specific specialization. This agent excels at managing complex investigations and multi-step workflows that require flexible problem-solving across various domains. It can break down complicated tasks into manageable steps, coordinate multiple operations, and adapt to different requirements. Ideal for scenarios where you need broad capability rather than specialized expertise, such as research tasks, data analysis, process automation, and cross-functional problem-solving.

features.name: Custom Subagents
features.summary_ja: 独自サブエージェントの作成
features.description_ja: .claude/agents/<name>.md にエージェント定義を置くと、自分専用のサブエージェントが作れる。
features.summary_en: Create custom subagents by defining agent specifications in your .claude/agents directory for personalized automation.
features.description_en: Create your own custom subagents by placing agent definitions in the .claude/agents/<name>.md file. This allows you to build personalized subagents tailored to your specific needs and workflows. Each agent definition file should contain the configuration and behavior specifications for your custom subagent. Once defined, these subagents become available for use within your Claude Code environment, enabling you to extend functionality and automate tasks according to your unique requirements.

features.name: Worktree Isolation
features.summary_ja: git worktreeでエージェント隔離
features.description_ja: サブエージェントを別のgit worktreeで動かしてmainと隔離。並列開発の事故防止に。
features.summary_en: Agent isolation using git worktree to run subagents in separate worktrees isolated from main branch.
features.description_en: Run subagents in isolated git worktrees separate from the main branch to prevent accidents during parallel development. This feature enables multiple agents to work simultaneously on different tasks without interfering with each other's changes. Each subagent operates in its own worktree environment, allowing safe concurrent development and reducing merge conflicts. Ideal for complex projects requiring parallel work streams while maintaining code stability in the main branch.

features.name: Skills System
features.summary_ja: 再利用可能なスキルシステム
features.description_ja: .claude/skills/<name>/SKILL.md でスキル定義。description のキーワードでトリガーされ、Claudeが自動的に呼び出す。
features.summary_en: Reusable skill system for extending Claude's capabilities with custom functionality
features.description_en: Define custom skills by creating skill definition files at .claude/skills/<name>/SKILL.md. Skills are automatically triggered and invoked by Claude based on keywords specified in the description field. This system enables you to extend Claude's functionality with reusable, modular capabilities that can be seamlessly integrated into your workflow. Each skill operates independently and can be triggered contextually based on user input or task requirements.

features.name: SKILL.md Structure
features.summary_ja: スキル定義ファイルの構造
features.description_ja: frontmatter に description（トリガー文）、name、tools などを書く。本文は手順・ルール・テンプレート。
features.summary_en: Structure and format of skill definition files for organizing and defining custom skills
features.description_en: Skill definition files use frontmatter to declare metadata including description (trigger text), name, and tools list. The frontmatter section is written in YAML format between triple dashes. The file body contains the actual skill implementation, including step-by-step procedures, operational rules, and response templates. This structure allows skills to be properly registered and executed by the system while keeping documentation and implementation organized together.

features.name: Plugin Marketplace
features.summary_ja: 公式プラグインマーケット
features.description_ja: Anthropic公式や有志によるプラグイン（スキル/エージェントのバンドル）を配布・取得できるマーケット。
features.summary_en: Official plugin marketplace for distributing and discovering plugins, skills, and agent bundles from Anthropic and the community.
features.description_en: A marketplace platform for distributing and acquiring plugins—bundled collections of skills and agents—created by Anthropic and community contributors. Users can browse, discover, and install plugins to extend Claude's capabilities with specialized functionality. The marketplace provides a centralized hub for sharing custom tools and integrations, enabling developers to publish their creations and users to enhance their Claude experience with community-driven and officially-supported plugins.

features.name: Skill Triggers
features.summary_ja: スキルの自動起動トリガー
features.description_ja: SKILL.md の description に書いたキーワードが入力にマッチすると Claude が自動でスキルを呼び出す仕組み。

examples.title: Description example
examples.code: description: PRレビューしたい時に使う

features.summary_en: Automatic skill activation triggers that invoke Claude skills based on keyword matching
features.description_en: A mechanism where Claude automatically invokes skills when keywords defined in a skill's SKILL.md description file match the user's input. This enables seamless skill activation without explicit user commands, allowing Claude to intelligently recognize when a particular skill should be applied based on contextual keywords. Skills are triggered only when their predefined keywords are detected in the input, making the interaction more intuitive and efficient.

features.name: MCP Overview
features.summary_ja: Model Context Protocol
features.description_ja: 外部ツール・APIをClaudeに統合するためのオープンプロトコル。GitHub、Slack、DBなどへの橋渡し。
features.summary_en: Model Context Protocol - an open protocol for integrating external tools and APIs with Claude.
features.description_en: The Model Context Protocol is an open standard that enables seamless integration of external tools and APIs into Claude. It acts as a bridge connecting Claude to various platforms and services including GitHub, Slack, databases, and other external systems. This protocol allows developers to extend Claude's capabilities by providing context and enabling interactions with third-party services, making it easier to build sophisticated applications that leverage both Claude's language understanding and external data sources or tools.

features.name: MCP stdio Server
features.summary_ja: 標準入出力ベースのMCPサーバー
features.description_ja: プロセス起動して stdin/stdout でやりとりするMCPサーバー。最も一般的。Pythonやnpx で簡単に動かせる。
features.summary_en: Standard input/output based MCP server that communicates via stdin/stdout with spawned processes.
features.description_en: An MCP server that communicates with spawned processes using standard input and output streams. This is the most common implementation approach. It can be easily run using Python or npx commands. The server manages process lifecycle and handles bidirectional communication through stdio, making it a straightforward and widely-supported way to integrate external tools and services with Claude.

features.name: MCP SSE Server
features.summary_ja: Server-Sent Events型のMCPサーバー
features.description_ja: HTTP経由でストリーミング通信するMCPサーバー。クラウドホスト型サービスに向く。
features.summary_en: MCP server using Server-Sent Events protocol for streaming communication over HTTP
features.description_en: An MCP server that enables streaming communication through HTTP using the Server-Sent Events (SSE) protocol. This architecture is particularly well-suited for cloud-hosted services and environments where persistent connections over HTTP are preferred. The SSE-based approach allows for efficient, unidirectional data streaming from the server to clients, making it ideal for real-time updates and long-lived connections in web-based deployments.

features.name: MCP HTTP Server
features.summary_ja: REST/HTTP型のMCPサーバー
features.description_ja: 標準的なHTTPでやり取りするMCPサーバー。シンプルなリクエスト/レスポンスモデル。
features.summary_en: REST/HTTP-based MCP server for standard HTTP communication with a simple request/response model.
features.description_en: An MCP server that communicates using standard HTTP protocol. It implements a straightforward request/response model, making it easy to integrate with web-based systems and services. This server type is ideal for scenarios where you need to expose MCP capabilities over HTTP endpoints, allowing clients to interact with your resources through standard RESTful interfaces.

features.name: Status Line
features.summary_ja: プロンプト下部のカスタム表示
features.description_ja: git ブランチ、モデル名、コンテキスト残量など、自分の好みに合わせて統合バーを表示できる。
features.summary_en: Customizable display line at the bottom of the prompt showing git branch, model name, context usage, and other information.
features.description_en: Display a customizable status bar at the bottom of the prompt with information tailored to your preferences. Show git branch details, current model name, remaining context tokens, and other relevant data in an integrated status line. Configure the status line to display exactly the information you need, helping you stay informed about your current environment and resource usage while working with Claude.

features.name: Keybindings
features.summary_ja: キーボードショートカット
features.description_ja: ~/.claude/keybindings.json でキー割当をカスタマイズ。chord（複数キー）対応。
features.summary_en: Customize keyboard shortcuts in ~/.claude/keybindings.json with support for multi-key chord combinations.
features.description_en: Customize your keyboard shortcuts by editing the keybindings configuration file located at ~/.claude/keybindings.json. This feature allows you to tailor keyboard interactions to match your workflow preferences. The system supports chord combinations, enabling you to bind multiple keys pressed together to perform specific actions. This flexibility makes it possible to create personalized keyboard shortcuts that enhance productivity and reduce reliance on mouse interactions. Configure keybindings to streamline your most frequently used operations.

features.name: VS Code Extension
features.summary_ja: VS Code拡張機能
features.description_ja: VS CodeにClaude Codeを統合。エディタ内でClaudeと対話、現在のファイル/選択範囲を即文脈化。
features.summary_en: VS Code extension that integrates Claude directly into your editor for seamless AI-assisted development.
features.description_en: Integrate Claude Code directly into VS Code for a seamless development experience. Interact with Claude without leaving your editor, and automatically contextualize your current file or selected code. This extension brings the power of Claude's AI capabilities to your fingertips, enabling faster coding, debugging, and problem-solving within the familiar VS Code environment. Access Claude's intelligence while maintaining your workflow.

features.name: JetBrains Plugin
features.summary_ja: JetBrains IDE プラグイン
features.description_ja: IntelliJ / WebStorm / PyCharm などへClaude Codeを統合。VS Code版と同等。
features.summary_en: JetBrains IDE Plugin for Claude Code integration with IntelliJ, WebStorm, PyCharm and more.
features.description_en: Integrate Claude Code directly into JetBrains IDEs including IntelliJ IDEA, WebStorm, PyCharm, and other JetBrains products. This plugin brings the same powerful Claude Code features available in VS Code to your preferred JetBrains development environment. Access Claude's AI capabilities seamlessly within your IDE for enhanced coding, debugging, and development workflows.

features.name: Fast Mode
features.summary_ja: 高速応答モード
features.description_ja: /fast コマンドで Opus 4.6 ベースの高速応答に切替。Opus 4.6 でのみ利用可能。
features.summary_en: Fast response mode using Opus 4.6 for quicker model responses
features.description_en: Switch to fast response mode powered by Claude Opus 4.6 using the /fast command. This feature enables quicker model responses while maintaining quality output. The fast mode is exclusively available when using Opus 4.6 as your selected model. Simply invoke the /fast command to activate this mode and experience faster response times for your queries. This is particularly useful when you prioritize speed over the maximum capabilities of larger models.
